Class CodeRefinementBatchPolymorphic

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text.AbstractTextResourceWrite
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.coderefiner.polymorphic.CodeRefinementBatchPolymorphic
public class CodeRefinementBatchPolymorphic extends AbstractTextResourceWrite
A container for a batch of structural Java refinement operations.

This class orchestrates multiple CodeRefinementIntentPolymorphics targeted at a single source file. It extends AbstractTextResourceWrite to leverage the platform's high-fidelity diff rendering and resource-locking mechanisms.

Author:
anahata

  • Method Details

    • doCalculateResultingContent

      protected String doCalculateResultingContent(Agi agi) throws Exception
      Performs the actual, tool-specific calculation of the resulting content.

      Calculates the resulting source code by simulating the AST modifications defined in the batch. This is used by the UI to show a unified side-by-side diff before execution.

      Specified by:
      doCalculateResultingContent in class AbstractTextResourceWrite
      Parameters:
      agi - The parent agi session.
      Returns:
      The calculated resulting content as a String.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the calculation logic fails.

    • applyTo

      public void applyTo(org.netbeans.api.java.source.WorkingCopy wc) throws Exception
      Authoritatively applies all intents in this batch to the provided working copy using a single-shot atomic rewrite strategy.
      Parameters:
      wc - The working copy to modify.
      Throws:
      Exception - if any intent application fails.

    • validate

      public void validate(Agi agi) throws Exception
      Performs pre-flight validation of the update operation. Note: This method ensures state is captured.

      Validates that the resource is in context and is a valid Java source.

      Overrides:
      validate in class AbstractTextResourceWrite
      Parameters:
      agi - The parent agi session.
      Throws:
      Exception - if validation fails.

    • findMemberIndex

      public static int findMemberIndex(org.netbeans.api.java.source.CompilationInfo info, List<? extends Tree> members, Tree target)
      Finds the 0-based index of a member tree inside a list of members.
      Parameters:
      info - The compilation context info.
      members - The list of siblings.
      target - The member to locate.
      Returns:
      The 0-based index of the target, or -1 if not found.

    • rebuildClassTree

      public static ClassTree rebuildClassTree(org.netbeans.api.java.source.TreeMaker make, ClassTree ct, List<Tree> members)
      Rebuilds a class tree with the specified list of members.
      Parameters:
      make - The IDE tree maker.
      ct - The original class tree.
      members - The new list of members.
      Returns:
      The rebuilt class tree node.

    • cloneTree

      public static Tree cloneTree(org.netbeans.api.java.source.TreeMaker make, Tree tree)
      Clones a tree node into the current WorkingCopy context.
      Parameters:
      make - The IDE tree maker.
      tree - The original tree node to clone.
      Returns:
      The cloned tree node.
